notes: wwi-britain expansion corpus has first-pass Codex-assisted MIPVU decisions for all 4 manifest documents and 18,213 lexical units. CMT/Koenigsbergian and downstream analysis artifacts remain provisional until independent review and reliability sampling are complete.
limitations: Source text is English OCR from Internet Archive and requires OCR review before publication-grade claims.
Draft stubs must not be treated as support evidence until reviewed annotations and CMT mappings exist.
Reliability sampling for the expanded corpus remains to be designed in a later milestone issue.
